overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy Night City checkpoint at night, transitioning from traditional Asian-inspired architecture to neon-lit urban streets with digital billboards and wet pavement reflecting the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with traditional pagoda-style gates

events.description: character begins walking forward through the checkpoint gate
passing by a pedestrian with blue hair walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the checkpoint gate, passing concrete barriers and a guard standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform standing near the checkpoint barrier
pedestrian with blue hair and red skirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: large Asian-inspired gate structure with pagoda roof and illuminated warm columns
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the right side of the path
tall street lamp casting warm orange light through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a security checkpoint featuring traditional architecture with pagoda-style roofs and warm lighting. A guard stands near the entrance as the character passes by concrete barriers and encounters a pedestrian with distinctive blue hair walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated approach road with concrete barriers

events.description: distant city lights and skyline become visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy road between concrete barriers, approaching the city proper

entered.detail: foggy silhouette of Night City buildings with scattered lights piercing through the haze
red traffic signal visible at the end of the road

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a foggy elevated roadway flanked by concrete barriers on both sides. The checkpoint gate recedes into the background as the distant lights of Night City emerge through the haze ahead, with a red traffic light visible at the road's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial signage and neon billboards

events.description: character turns left at the intersection onto the sidewalk path
entering commercial district with illuminated digital billboards and neon signs

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians in the commercial area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and beige pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red illuminated street sign with white 'Sequoia' text mounted on a pole
green neon sign reading 'NIGHT CITY' visible in the distance
low commercial building with illuminated '07' signage on the facade
large illuminated advertisement screen showing colorful graphics and '77' text

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection, passing a red 'Sequoia' street sign and entering a commercial area. Building '07' appears on the left while bright digital billboards illuminate the foggy night. Other pedestrians walk along the sidewalk as the environment transitions from infrastructure to commercial urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk promenade with metal railings and large digital displays

events.description: passing close to a pedestrian in dark clothing who temporarily blocks the right side of view
scattered trash and debris visible on the wet sidewalk surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside a metal railing, passing other pedestrians while observing the neon-lit cityscape and distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and red pants walking ahead, then stepping aside

entered.detail: metal barricade fence with horizontal bars running along the left side of the walkway
tall tower structure with multiple stacked digital screens displaying advertisements
tall futuristic tower with lights visible through the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk beside a metal safety railing, with large digital billboards towering overhead on the left. The environment shows urban decay with scattered debris on the wet pavement, while distant skyscrapers pierce the foggy night. Other pedestrians share the walkway as the character moves deeper into the neon-lit district, with building '07' now visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a traditional security checkpoint into the neon-drenched urban decay of a futuristic city. It begins as the character passes a guard and a blue-haired pedestrian beneath pagoda-style roofs and warm lighting, moving past concrete barriers toward an elevated roadway. As the checkpoint recedes, the camera pushes through a dense fog where the distant lights of Night City and a red traffic signal gradually emerge from the haze. The scene then shifts at an intersection, turning left past a red Sequoia street sign and building 07 to enter a commercial district illuminated by towering digital billboards. Finally, the camera follows the character along a metal railing over wet, debris-strewn pavement, moving deeper into the neon-lit district as skyscrapers pierce the foggy night sky.
